---
title: "Economic Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial patterns of economic activities, production, and resource distribution."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---





Welcome to the **Economic Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course explores how economic activities — primary, secondary, tertiary, and quaternary — are distributed across space and how location, resources, and human decisions shape economic landscapes.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Factors affecting spatial organisation of economic activities (primary, secondary, tertiary and quarternary).**
* **Natural Resources (classification, distribution and associated problems), Natural Resources Management.**
* **World Energy Crises in Developed and Developing Countries.**

---

{{< include economic-geography/agricultural-inputs-and-productivity.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/classification-of-economies.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/conservation-of-resources.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/course-content.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/energy-crisis.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/food-and-nutritions-problems.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/food-security-famine-causes-effects-and-remedies.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/fundamentals-of-economic-geography.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/globalization-economic-space.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/location-of-economic-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/location-theories.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/measurement-and-problems.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/natural-resources-renewable-and-non-renewable.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/patterns-of-world-trade.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/primary-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/secondary-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/sectors-of-the-economy.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/spatial-organization-of-economies.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/tertiary-quaternary-activities.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/the-limits-to-growth.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/world-agriculture-typology-of-agricultural-regions.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/world-industries-location-patterns-and-problems.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/world-resources-and-their-distribution.md >}}
